meaning: n.宴请,款待,请客vt.视为,对待,论述,治疗,款待vi.交涉,谈判,协商,款待,作东
examples: None of us knew how to treat her.
We treat boys exactly the same as girls.
Valium is usually prescribed to treat anxiety.
Mr Paes promised to "work hard and treat the citizens with a lot of respect".
The medical students in turn have to figure out how to treat the patient.
